hero.headline: We engineer expeditions for the uncompromising traveler.
hero.subtitle: Select your South Island sectors. Swap alpine heli-skiing for deep-water charters. Our real-time logistics engine maps rotor-minutes, local weather channels, and guide manifests instantly.

mission.headline: Your time is the only finite resource. We engineer the experiences that honor it.
mission.bodyText: We have replaced the legacy week-long travel consultation with a real-time logical compiler. By cross-referencing helicopter flight envelopes, private high-country station boundaries, and certified guide availability in milliseconds, we deliver fully validated, zero-delay expedition itineraries before other agencies return a call.

engine.headline: Dynamic Logistics. Instant Feasibility.
engine.description: Bypass the weeks of back-and-forth planning. Drag, drop, and swap modules to match your exact physical ambition. Our proprietary engine compiles and verifies your selections in milliseconds, checking rotor hours, weather history, and guide availability.
engine.validationMessage: ✓ Systems Compiled. Flight windows clear. Guide credentials validated.

title: Fiordland Sanctuary
description: An alpine and fjord sanctuary in New Zealand's deepest wilderness. Access restricted high-altitude plateaus via private turbine helicopter, traverse glaciers and ridges with elite guides (or optionally swap to swiftwater packrafting), and retire to a geothermal eco-lodge accessible only by air.
subtitle: High-Altitude Air Insertion & Deep Fjord Catamaran Charter

days.title: Turbine Heli-Transit & Milford Sound Private Charter
days.description: Bypass the four-hour highway drive and congested tour coaches. Launch directly from Queenstown Airport via private AS350 B3 Squirrel helicopter, tracing the jagged ridges of the Humboldt Range. Land directly on a private helipad aboard a 24-meter luxury catamaran deep within Milford Sound. Spend two days navigating the towering fjord walls, dining on a five-course local wild food tasting menu prepared by an onboard private chef, and falling asleep to the absolute silence of the sound.
days.logistics: Transit: 42-minute rotor flight. Helicopter: AS350 B3 Squirrel. Marine: Exclusive charter, 24m Catamaran. Guides: Local Skipper & Master Angler.

days.title: Glacial Heli-Hike & Ridge Traverse
days.description: Fly to a high-altitude alpine plateau on Mount Tutoko or the Darran Mountains. Guided by an elite IFMGA-certified alpine professional, traverse spectacular glacier fields and panoramic rocky ridges overlooking deep glacial valleys. For those seeking active river navigation, the swiftwater Hollyford River packrafting expedition is available as a fully integrated optional swap.
days.logistics: Transit: Private heli-insertion. Terrain: Crevasse walking & alpine ridge traverse. Technical Swap: Optional grade-2 river packrafting. Safety: IFMGA Mountain Guides.

days.title: Restricted High-Country Off-Road & Geothermal Eco-Lodge
days.description: Secure self-drive access to a heavily modified Land Rover Defender and navigate restricted off-road high-country stations. Ford alpine rivers and ascend steep glacial scree tracks under the direction of an elite precision driving guide. Conclude your journey at an award-winning, off-grid luxury eco-lodge. Soak in geothermal-heated hot tubs overlooking the silent, dark fjord waters, recovering your baseline in complete comfort.
days.logistics: Vehicles: Land Rover Defender 110 (custom off-road spec). Accommodation: Private eco-villa (100% solar & geothermal). Inclusions: Geothermal hot springs & private host.

pricing.minimumGroup: Tailored for private groups of 2 to 6 guests
inclusions: All private helicopter flight hours and pilot standby fees
Private Milford Sound yacht charter and private onboard chef
Top-tier alpine mountaineering and ridge-walking gear (or premium packrafting/drysuits for the swap)
Custom Land Rover Defender self-drive vehicle hire and private driving guides
Three nights of exclusive-use luxury eco-lodge accommodation
All premium local wines, wild-caught seafood, and organic dining inclusions

title: Alpine Adrenaline
description: High-altitude operations designed for alpine enthusiasts. Drop into 800,000 acres of unrestricted Southern Alps powder, rope up with IFMGA-certified guides on the Tasman Glacier, and fly directly to the Harris Saddle to traverse the Routeburn's most technical high pass.
subtitle: Glacier Crevasse Mountaineering & 800,000-Acre Heli-Skiing

days.title: Tasman Glacier Ice-Climbing & Crevasse Navigation
days.description: Heli-drop directly onto the active white expanse of the Tasman Glacier, New Zealand’s longest river of ice. Rope up with your personal IFMGA-certified alpine guide, strap on technical crampons, and spend two days ice-climbing towering frozen seracs, exploring hidden electric-blue ice caves, and learning crevasse rescue techniques. Retire each night to a glass-fronted alpine shelter built on a sheer rock ridge, watching the stars wheel over Mt. Cook.
days.logistics: Transit: Heli-drop onto Tasman Glacier. Technical: Technical crampons, ice screws, and harness systems. Accommodation: Mountain ridge shelter (private chef catered).

days.title: Southern Alps Unrestricted Heli-Skiing Operations
days.description: Wake up to crisp, sub-zero alpine air. Board your dedicated Eurocopter EC130 and launch into 800,000 acres of permitted, untouched powder across the Southern Alps. With no designated trails and infinite vertical feet, your guide will map custom powder runs matching your physical capability. Carve pristine slopes rarely touched by humans, concluding each day with mountain-top champagne and local high-country reserve tasting boxes.
days.logistics: Aviation: Eurocopter EC130 (dedicated private charter). Terrain: 800,000 permitted backcountry acres. Guide Ratio: 1:3 maximum. Safety: Pulse-beacons, avalanche packs provided.

days.title: Harris Saddle High Pass Technical Traverse
days.description: Bypass the multiple-day hiking trails. Fly directly to the high-altitude Harris Saddle (1,255m) on the famed Routeburn Track. Spend two days executing a technical ridge traverse across alpine scree, cascading waterfalls, and spectacular hanging valleys. Conclude the traverse by flying directly out to a private high-country sheep station, enjoying a slow-roasted local lamb rack and fine Central Otago pinot noir by a roaring open hearth.
days.logistics: Hike parameters: 12.5km technical high-pass route. Elevation change: +650m / -400m. Transition: Saddle heli-extraction. Dining: Private country estate host.

suppliers.label: Heli-Ski Operator
suppliers.name: Apex Heli-Ski NZ
suppliers.credential: Exclusive Southern Alps Backcountry Licensee // CAA Part 135

pricing.minimumGroup: Tailored for private groups of 2 to 4 guests
inclusions: Dedicated standby helicopter hours and private Eurocopter charter

Unrestricted heli-skiing passes and unlimited vertical drops
All luxury alpine lodge and high-altitude shelter accommodations
All gourmet meals, private chef catering, and premium high-altitude reserve dining

title: Active Restoration
description: Elite performance requires deep physical resetting. Fly-cast for wild trophy trout in inaccessible, crystal-clear glacial streams, cycle premium electric mountain bikes through private Gibbston Valley cellar doors, and reset at a private canyon-edge thermal sanctuary.
imageCaption: Gibbston Valley // Private Cellar Library Reserve

modules.label: Shotover Canyon Private Thermal Onsen & Spa

subtitle: Backcountry Glacial Fly-Fishing & Canyon-Edge Thermal Recovery

days.title: Backcountry Helicopter Fly-Fishing Operations
days.description: Board your private helicopter and fly deep into untracked backcountry river valleys inaccessible by foot or vehicle. Spend two days walking the crystal-clear, emerald pools of remote mountain rivers. Under the instruction of a master angler, fly-cast for wild trophy Brown and Rainbow trout in complete silence. Experience the meditative focus of stalking trout in water so clear they appear suspended in air. All fishing is strictly catch-and-release.
days.logistics: Transit: 25-minute heli-flight into restricted valley. Equipment: Premium Orvis fly gear & waders. Guides: NZ Professional Fishing Guides Association member.

days.title: Gibbston Reserve Vineyard E-Bike & Private Cellars
days.description: Mount a premium, high-torque electric mountain bike and glide along the rugged trails of the Gibbston Valley wine region. Access private, non-public vineyards and gravel farm paths. Meet estate founders for exclusive cellar door library reserve tastings directly from the barrels. Enjoy curated Central Otago charcuterie boards while learning the high-altitude viticulture that defines Central Otago Pinot Noir.
days.logistics: Bikes: Specialized Turbo Tero electric mountain bikes. Route: 18km private gravel trails. Access: Direct entry to 3 private family-owned vineyards.

days.title: Shotover Canyon Private Thermal Onsen & Spa
days.description: Conclude your expedition with an active biological reset. Secure exclusive-use access to a premier alpine wellness sanctuary perched on the cliffs of the Shotover Canyon. Transition between geothermal hot pools, cryotherapy cold plunges, and dry cedar saunas to reset your vascular system. Includes customized deep-tissue sports massage and private culinary nutrition design to restore your baseline strength.
days.logistics: Facility: Private, exclusive-use thermal sanctuary. Recovery: Cryotherapy, Onsen, and cedar sauna. Treatment: 90-minute bespoke clinical sports massage.

suppliers.credential: Exclusive Cellar Door Access & Library Reserve Allocations
